observations.summary: The dreamscape is dominated by overwhelming darkness, but it is actively fractured by lines of blinding white-hot light, symbolizing a tension between oppressive nightmare and piercing illumination.

left_evidence.quote: Dagon's form surged forward—a tidal wave of darkness. The dream began to fracture. Lines of blinding white-hot light cracked through the suffocating black

right_evidence.quote: Lines of blinding white-hot light cracked through the suffocating black, the nightmare diminuendoing toward its final unresolved seventh

observations.summary: The nightmare is collapsing and fracturing, yet it moves toward a final unresolved chord, representing a tension between disintegration and an incomplete resolution.

left_evidence.quote: The dream began to fracture. Lines of blinding white-hot light cracked through the suffocating black

right_evidence.quote: the nightmare diminuendoing toward its final unresolved seventh—the phantom opera of stone against stone in the deeps below the world, collapsing toward a chord that would never resolve
